positive: A detailed, symmetrical bohemian celestial jungle print, featuring interconnected silhouettes of crescent moons, stylized mythical fauna (e.g., flying foxes, serene lotuses), and winding constellations. The art style is neo-tribal linework combined with sacred geometry, rendered in deep midnight blue, vibrant emerald green, and metallic gold accents. Composition must be highly centralized and balanced, creating a repeating, tileable pattern suitable for full-chest apparel printing. Strong use of positive/negative space to define clean silhouettes and high contrast. Intricate details, vector quality, highly decorative.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, grainy, watermark, logo, text, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, random, out of focus
